title: Warm Homes and Public Sector Decarbonisation Devolution Programme: privacy notice
body: "This notice sets out how DESNZ will use your personal data relating to The Warm Homes and Public Sector Decarbonisation Devolution Programme (Retrofit Devolution Programme), and your rights. It also sets out your rights. It is made under Articles 13 and/or 14 of the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR).  "
